title: EmailSendPro Tenant Branding
description: Per-tenant branding profile consumed by /usr/local/bin/email-send-pro. One file per tenant lives at /mnt/clients/<tenant>/openclaw/workspace/branding.json. The fallback default lives at /mnt/system/base/skills/email-send-pro/branding.default.json. Every field has a documented default; missing fields are filled from default.

logo_url.description: Absolute https URL to a small logo image (recommended 240x60 PNG or SVG hosted on the tenant's domain or jam-bot.com). Rendered top-left of the email header. Optional — when omitted the tenant_name renders as text-only.

tenant_name.description: Display name for the email header and signature. Examples: 'Contractors Choice', 'JamBot', 'Foambot'. Required only via the default fallback — the default value is 'JamBot'.

header_bg_color.description: Hex color for the header bar background. Default '#0f172a' (slate-900).

header_text_color.description: Hex color for header text and the small tenant_name label rendered beside the logo. Default '#ffffff'.

accent_color.description: Hex color used for the CTA button background, section heading underline, and canvas-link card borders. Default '#3b82f6' (blue-500).

body_font_stack.description: CSS font-family stack applied inline to body cells. Default '-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif'.

footer_copy.description: Free-text footer line rendered above the unsubscribe row. Default 'Sent by JamBot on behalf of the tenant. jam-bot.com'.
footer_copy.default: Sent by JamBot — agent-powered communication for local businesses. jam-bot.com

signature_name.description: Name on the sign-off line. Examples: "Josh's Assistant", 'The Contractors Choice Team', 'JamBot'. Default 'JamBot'.

signature_title.description: Optional role line under signature_name. Example: 'Operations Assistant'. Default empty.

contact_email.description: Optional contact email rendered in the signature block. Default empty.

contact_phone.description: Optional contact phone rendered in the signature block. Free-text format. Default empty.

contact_url.description: Optional website URL rendered in the signature block. Default empty.

unsubscribe_url.description: Optional unsubscribe link. Recommended for CAN-SPAM/CASL compliance on broadcast sends. Default empty (link row hidden when blank).

email_provider.description: Which provider sends this tenant's outbound email. 'agentmail' = default (jam-bot@agentmail.to or per-inbox label). 'inkbox' = paid InkBox identity (per-tenant inbox + phone provisioned via dashboard). Default 'agentmail'.

inkbox_inbox.description: InkBox identity email address (e.g. 'seattleroofing@inkboxmail.com'). REQUIRED if email_provider=='inkbox'. Used as path param to POST /api/v1/mail/mailboxes/{email_address}/messages. Default empty.

inkbox_phone.description: InkBox-provisioned phone number in E.164 format (e.g. '+15092861499'). Used by SMS pathways, not email-send-pro itself. Default empty.

inkbox_phone_id.description: InkBox phone_id (UUID) required by the SMS endpoint /api/v1/phone/numbers/{phone_id}/texts. Not used by email-send-pro but tracked here for tenant-config single-source-of-truth. Default empty.

inkbox_api_key_env_var.description: Name of the env var that holds this tenant's InkBox API key. Per-tenant workspaces commonly use 'INKBOX_API_KEY'; setup-host uses 'SETUP_INKBOX_API_KEY'. Default 'INKBOX_API_KEY'.
